subject: feat(pwa): generate dedicated 1024x1024 maskable icon
body:
Added 1024x1024 to the icon generation script and updated the PWA
manifest to use it for the maskable entry instead of reusing 512x512.
Regenerated all icons with current theme colors.

Tags: pwa, icons
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-centralization
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Dua8Xbp3cH9mgvvtK9FuLo
title: generate dedicated 1024x1024 maskable icon
